---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for GuessWho
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'type: feature'
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Feature Description
<!-- A clear description of the feature you're proposing -->

## 💡 Motivation
<!-- Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## 📋 Proposed Solution
<!-- How should this feature work? Include examples if possible -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## 📊 Priority
<!-- Select one by marking with [x] -->
- [ ] Critical - Blocking or security-related
- [ ] High - Important for next release
- [ ] Medium - Planned for future
- [ ] Low - Nice to have

## 🏗️ Phase
<!-- Which roadmap phase does this belong to? -->
- [ ] Phase 1: Core Enhancements
- [ ] Phase 2: Intelligence Layer
- [ ] Phase 3: Scale & Performance
- [ ] Phase 4: Ecosystem & Integration
- [ ] Phase 5: Advanced Features
- [ ] Not on roadmap

## 📈 Difficulty Estimate
- [ ] Easy - Good for newcomers
- [ ] Medium - Requires moderate experience
- [ ] Hard - Complex task requiring expertise

## ℹ️ Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples -->
